## 2026-05-11

### Impact

- Adds a headless mode for action tasks, letting integrators run an action without presenting Transact UI.

### Changes

- Added a `headless` parameter to `Atomic.presentAction(...)` and `TransactActionPresenter.present(...)`, plus a corresponding `headless` field on `AtomicConfig.Task`. Defaults to `false` so existing call sites are unaffected.

### Products

- Manage

### Requirements

| Name  | Version |
| ----- | ------- |
| Xcode | >= 26.1 |
| iOS   | >= 15.0 |
